name: Harness (ACP)
description: Runs the standalone Python harness as an ACP subprocess via an OpenClaw AgentHarness.

pythonPath.label: Python executable
pythonPath.help: Path to the Python that runs harness-acp. Leave unset to resolve from OPENCLAW_HARNESS_PYTHON / PATH.

allowGatedTools.label: Allow approval-gated tools
allowGatedTools.help: When off (default), tools that require approval are denied in this headless embedded context. Turn on only if you accept the harness running gated tools without an interactive prompt.
